titleStmt.title: SII 37.401: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 401. (A.R. No. B 43 of 1941-42.) Sōmireḍḍipalle, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the ruined temple of Śiva on the Gangamma-miṭṭa, 1(1/2) km east of the village.
This is dated in the cyclic year Svabhānu, Śrāvaṇa śu. 15, Friday, Lunar eclipse.

It records the grant of the village Goḍlavīṭi Voḍḍemādanapalli, now surnamed Jōtirājapuram, situated in the Sakalipāya (division) by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jōtirāju Guṇḍayadēva mahārāju for the merit of his parents Jōtirāju and Maldēvi, as an agrahāra to his religious preceptor Aghōraśivāchārya. The chief bears the epithets Tribhunṇimalla, Bhuvanatriṇētra, Jagaddāḷa Pāṇḍyarāyagajakēsari and Niśśankapratapa. The gift was made in the presence of god Tripurāntakadēva. In characters of the 15th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svabhānu saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śu 15 śu svasti .
samastabhuvna praśasti mahimāspada yama niya
māsana prāṇāyāma pratyāhāra dhyāna dhāraṇa
mōnānuśṭhāna japahōma samādhi śivārādhana śīlaguṇa
saṁpanna nānāvidha nigamāgama tātparyya paryālōcana
cāturyya dhurīṇa śrīmadrāyarājagurunāma
dhēyāṁka paramanaiṣṭhika śrīmadaghōra śivācā
ryaAyyaṁgāri divyaśrīpādapadmaṁbulakunu
hapriya śiṣyulaina . śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra tribhuvaṇīmallabhuvana triṇētra jagaddāḷa pā
ṁḍyarāya gajakēsari niśśaṁka pratāpa jōti
rāju guṁḍayadēvamahārājulu sā
ṣṭāṁgga daṁḍḍa praṇāmaṁbbuUsēsi yiccina
dhaṁrmaśāsanamu . Īdivasamaṁddu
lasōmagrahaṇa puṇyakālamaṁddu
tripurāṁttaka dēvara saṁnnidhiyaṁddu

mā tallidaṁḍrulaina jōtirājuṁ
gārikiṁnni maldēviṁgārikiṁnni puṇya
ṁgānu mā nāyaṁkaṟānakuṁ je
lle sakili pāyalōni goḍlavīṭi vaḍḍe mādana pa
lleki mā taṁḍrigāripēranu jōtirājapurama
nē nāmāṁkkitaṁsēsi Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigā
nu Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyamugānu sadakṣi
ṇākaṁtōḍanu mīku dhāravōsi Agrahā
ramugānu mī śrīcaraṇālaku samarppaṇa
sēstimi . Ñ svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ para
dattānupālanaṁ svadattāpahārē
ṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 37.401 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
